name: Google Pub/Sub Monitor
description: Pull messages from a Google Cloud Pub/Sub subscription and trigger jobs when messages are received

triggers.description: Triggers when messages are pulled from the Pub/Sub subscription

outputs.description: Passes message information (message_id, data, attributes, publish_time) to triggered jobs via run_config

subscription.label: Subscription Name
subscription.description: Pub/Sub subscription name (short name, not full resource path)

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Name of the job to trigger when messages are received

max_messages_per_pull.label: Max Messages Per Pull
max_messages_per_pull.description: Maximum number of messages to pull per evaluation

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Optional Dagster resource key providing a pre-configured client. When set, context.resources.<resource_key> is used instead of creating a connection from the other fields. See README for the expected interface.
